title: Provider Model Cost Registry v1
description: Registry of AI model pricing and capability metadata. Consumed by annulus and cap for cost estimation and display. Producer: operator or ecosystem maintainer. Consumer: annulus statusline, cap dashboard.

models.description: List of model pricing and capability entries.

provider.description: Provider name, e.g. anthropic, openai, google.

model_id.description: Model identifier used in API calls, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6.

display_name.description: Human-readable model name for display in dashboards.

cost_per_1m_input_tokens.description: USD cost per 1 million input tokens.

cost_per_1m_output_tokens.description: USD cost per 1 million output tokens.

cost_per_1m_cached_input_tokens.description: USD cost per 1 million cached (prompt cache hit) input tokens. Null if cache pricing is not available for this model.

context_window.description: Maximum number of tokens in the full context window (input + output).

default_max_output_tokens.description: Default maximum output token limit for this model.

supports_tool_use.description: Whether the model supports tool/function calling.

supports_vision.description: Whether the model accepts image inputs.

as_of_date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of last pricing verification. Consumers should re-verify when this date is stale.
